prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年理科（物理类）最低位次约14886→15651→18709→23643，整体呈持续后移趋势，近4年累计后移约8757名；2025年基准约23643名，较2024年大幅后移4934名，竞争压力显著增大；该校在吉林省理科（物理类）招生计划：2021年176人、2022年177人、2024年177人、2025年181人；2026年计划177人，较2025年减少4人，小幅缩招约2.2%，对竞争略有加剧作用。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 东北林业大学为211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学主榜排名约第113–115名，近年排名稳定，属中上水平211院校；声誉文件中未见东北林业大学负面事件记录，学校声誉平稳；抖音热度排名第59位（共106所），评价为"较热"，综合热度约54.3万，短视频平台关注度处于中等偏上水平，对报考热度有一定正面影响。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程及其自动化等工科专业持续高热推荐，对理科考生吸引力较强；本省2026年普通高考总人数约110868人，较2025年（111492人）基本持平，按近年比例估算物理类约7.98万人，略减约0.7%；东北林业大学位于黑龙江省哈尔滨市，属东北地区。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续后移趋势、2026年招生计划小幅缩招（-2.2%）、考生总数基本持平、工科专业热度较高及学校声誉平稳等因素，预计2026年理科竞争在2025年基础上略有加剧但后移幅度收窄；预测最低位次约23380名，区间22880–23880名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for science (physics category) was approximately 14886 → 15651 → 18709 → 23643, showing a continuous backward trend, with a cumulative backward shift of about 8757 places over the past 4 years; the 2025 baseline is about 23643, a significant backward shift of 4934 places compared to 2024, indicating a marked increase in competition pressure; the university's enrollment plan in Jilin Province for science (physics category) was: 176 in 2021, 177 in 2022, 177 in 2024, and 181 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 177, a decrease of 4 from 2025, a slight reduction of about 2.2%, which slightly intensifies competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Northeast Forestry University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; its ranking on the Soft Science Chinese University Main Ranking is approximately 113–115, stable in recent years, belonging to the upper-middle level of 211 universities; no negative incidents were recorded in the reputation file, indicating a stable reputation; its Douyin popularity ranking is 59th (out of 106), rated as 'relatively hot', with a comprehensive popularity of about 543,000, indicating an above-average level of attention on short video platforms, which has a certain positive impact on application enthusiasm.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering and Automation continue to be highly recommended, strongly attracting science candidates; the total number of candidates for the 2026 ordinary college entrance examination in this province is about 110,868, basically unchanged from 2025 (111,492), with an estimated physics category of about 79,800 based on recent proportions, a slight decrease of about 0.7%; Northeast Forestry University is located in Harbin, Heilongjiang Province, in the Northeast region.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward trend of historical rankings, the slight reduction in enrollment plan for 2026 (-2.2%), the basically unchanged total number of candidates, the high popularity of engineering majors, and the stable reputation of the university, it is expected that competition in science in 2026 will slightly intensify compared to 2025 but the backward shift will narrow; the predicted minimum ranking is about 23380, with a range of 22880–23880.

If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 22800), you can focus on aiming for popular engineering majors like Computer Science and Electrical Engineering; if your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (e.g., above 23800), you should mainly rely on Tier 3 majors as safety options, while also considering Tier 2 moderate majors.
